---
name: "📝 DevLog Request"
about: "Request a deep technical explanation of a decision or code structure"
title: "[DEVLOG]: "
labels: "devlog, ai-plan"
assignees: ""
---

## 🏗️ Technical Topic
What architectural decision, function, or library needs a DevLog post?

## 📂 Source Files
Which files are most relevant to this topic? (e.g., `src/memory/store.rs`)

## 💡 Context
Why is this explanation important right now? (e.g., "We just migrated to SQLite-Vec and need to document the trade-offs").

## 🎯 Target Audience
Is this primarily for human contributors, or to provide high-level context for other AI agents?

## 📝 Notes for DevLog Writer
Any specific points or trade-offs that MUST be mentioned.
